summary: 此計畫旨在解決 AppConfig 模組化重構後遗漏的全域引用問題。我將遍歷所有報錯的檔案，並將舊的打平屬性存取更新為新的模組化路徑（如 config.Vision.CaptureFrameRate）。 (This plan aims to resolve the remaining global reference issues after the AppConfig modular refactoring. I will traverse all files with errors and update the old flat property accesses to the new modular paths.)
